title: Reward badge
description: Visual summary of a referral reward: type + amount + currency + role. Renders as a compact card / chip. Examples: '$25 credit for referrer' or '10% off for both'.

props.className: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-accent-subtle border

name.$expr: ({ percent_discount: 'tag', fixed_amount: 'currency-dollar', free_months: 'calendar', free_sessions: 'ticket', credits: 'wallet', point_award: 'star' })[props.rewardType]

children.$expr: ({ percent_discount: props.rewardAmount + '% off', fixed_amount: formatMoney(props.rewardAmount, props.rewardCurrency || 'USD'), free_months: props.rewardAmount + ' free ' + (props.rewardAmount === 1 ? 'month' : 'months'), free_sessions: props.rewardAmount + ' free ' + (props.rewardAmount === 1 ? 'session' : 'sessions'), credits: formatMoney(props.rewardAmount, props.rewardCurrency || 'USD') + ' credit', point_award: props.rewardAmount.toLocaleString() + ' points' })[props.rewardType]
